parsed_output.justification: Dylan claims to be the Drunk, but later asserts that there are two Werewolves in the center and that no Werewolves are in play. According to the rules, the Drunk swaps their card with one from the center without looking at the new card and has no ability to know the other cards in the center. This contradiction strongly suggests that Dylan is lying about his role and is likely a Werewolf or the Minion attempting to deceive the village into not voting.
